frontier: Erdos 142 (asymptotic behavior of r_3(N); prize headline OPEN and not resolvable by finite computation). Published lower-bound baseline: r_3(N) >= N * 2^(-(2*sqrt(log2(24/7)) + o(1)) * sqrt(log2 N)) (Elsholtz-Hunter-Proske-Sauermann, arXiv:2406.12290), constant 2.666539...; the atlas current_record still cites Behrend 1946 and is stale on the lower-bound side. Local alternating-return lane targets constant 2.649701794028333... conditional on a global no-negative-cycle certificate.
